# Sailboat

## Tags
ship, boat, harbor, harbour, dock

## Categories
transportation, travel

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/sailboat)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Sailboat;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Sailboat { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
